metadata.title: Shadow - Discord bot hosting (EUR 2/month per bot)
metadata.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform to host and manage Discord bots with auto commands, components v2, multi-language support and dynamic variables.

hero.title: Shadow - Host your Discord bots (from EUR 2/month per bot)
hero.description: Host and manage your bots with auto commands (prefix and slash), components v2, automatic help, multi-language support and dynamic variables.

card.title: Live fleet preview
card.subtitle: Track every bot instance from one operational surface.
card.preview: Real-time preview of your bot status

features.title: Main features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run your bots in production.

autoCommands.title: Automatic commands
autoCommands.description: Prefix and slash commands are generated and synced automatically for each bot.

componentsV2.title: Components v2
componentsV2.description: Full support for components v2 and reliable rich interactions.

autoHelp.title: Automatic help
autoHelp.description: Help and command documentation generated automatically.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Translate messages and command labels, then enable multiple locales quickly.

dynamicVariables.title: Dynamic variables
dynamicVariables.description: Dynamic templates with variables like bot_latency, guild_count and more.

hosting.title: Hosting and scalability
hosting.description: Simple plans at EUR 2/month per bot with monitoring and scalability included.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to take control of your bots.

addBot.title: Add a bot
addBot.description: Connect your Discord application with OAuth and register it in Shadow.

dashboard.title: Manage from dashboard
dashboard.description: Access commands, logs and settings from one centralized interface.

realtime.title: Control in real time
realtime.description: Start, stop and scale your bots instantly based on demand.

footer.tagline: Discord bot hosting - plans from EUR 2/month per bot

login.title: Connect your Discord account
login.description: Authenticate with OAuth2 to access your space and host your bots.

dashboard.loginDescription: Your dashboard is protected. Sign in with Discord to manage your bots.

addBot.title: Add a bot
addBot.description: The token is validated by the API and encrypted before it is stored.
